name: Avocado & Orange Salad with Walnuts
recipeIngredient: Red leaf lettuce, torn, as needed
recipeInstructions:
DRESSING
1 1/2 tbsp Walnut oil = OR =
Peanut oil
1/2 tbsp Lemon juice = OR =
Lime juice, to taste
1/2 tsp Mint
1/2 tsp Honey
Black pepper, to taste
Toast walnuts on a hot, dry skillet, stirring frequently, until they are fragrant. About 8 to 10 minutes. Remove from heat and let cool.
Combine salad ingredients in a serving bowl and toss with the walnuts. In a small bowl, stir together the dressing ingredients. Pour over the salad and toss to coat. Serve at once.
